시편 76:1.content: In Judah, God is known. His name is great in Israel.

시편 76:2.content: His tabernacle is also in Salem; His dwelling place in Zion.

시편 76:3.content: There he broke the flaming arrows of the bow, the shield, and the sword, and the weapons of war.

시편 76:4.content: Glorious are you, and excellent, more than mountains of game.

시편 76:5.content: Valiant men lie plundered, they have slept their last sleep. None of the men of war can lift their hands.

시편 76:6.content: At your rebuke, God of Jacob, both chariot and horse are cast into a dead sleep.

시편 76:7.content: You, even you, are to be feared. Who can stand in your sight when you are angry?

시편 76:8.content: You pronounced judgment from heaven. The earth feared, and was silent,

시편 76:9.content: when God arose to judgment, to save all the afflicted ones of the earth.

시편 76:10.content: Surely the wrath of man praises you. The survivors of your wrath are restrained.

시편 76:11.content: Make vows to Yahweh your God, and fulfill them! Let all of his neighbors bring presents to him who is to be feared.

시편 76:12.content: He will cut off the spirit of princes. He is feared by the kings of the earth.
